rationale: In the citing paper, Melumad, Inman, and Pham (2019) appears only as one item in a grouped citation that illustrates prior sentiment-analysis work using specific hashtags or keywords. The paper does not engage that study's smartphone-UGC theory, findings, or mechanism, and it is not used to build MEMSA's core conceptual or methodological contribution. There is no distinct functional role beyond broad background positioning in the SA literature.
